		$url,
		array(
			'headers' => array(
				'User-Agent' => sprintf(
					'%s (%s)',
					wp_specialchars_decode( get_bloginfo( 'name' ), ENT_QUOTES ),
					home_url()
				),
			),
			'timeout' => 15,
			'accept'  => 'application/vnd.github.v3+json',
		)
	)
